name: NAB Innovation Centre
activities: Uplifted the Role Creation workflow in the Self-Service Portal by adding robust API validation that verifies incoming data against complex backend constraints instead of leaving it to only UI validation.

Achieved a ~40% data retrieval speedup within a validated Proof-of-Concept (POC) by driving the technical migration of the Role Management Portal off a legacy SailPoint IIQ codebase into a standalone miniapp and rewriting inefficient core queries.

Conducted root-cause analysis to remediate production defects across 4 core Identity and Access Management (IAM) capabilities (Identity Lifecycle Management, application Connectors, Self-Service Portal, and Role Management Portal) while shipping feature enhancements requested by internal stakeholder teams.

Exercised strong proactiveness by independently building a POC internal test case management tool to transition the QA team off ad-hoc Confluence tracking, which is currently undergoing User Acceptance Testing alongside QA testers to validate functionality.
Graduated NAB StarCamp Batch 10 with prestigious MVP Certification (June 2025).
